initiatives.name: Yuma County Abolition
initiatives.description: A mutual aid grassroots organization dedicated to bringing education and resources, autonomy, abolition, decolonization, environmental justice, health, and intersectionality to our community

initiatives.name: Yuma for Palestine
initiatives.description: A Palestinian and Arab-led community organization building solidarity and mutual aid networks in Yuma through direct action, education, and community organizing for Palestinian liberation.
